notes: The launcher starts but the games crashes. "Failed to create device for rendering. Invalid resolution or cannot run without at least shader model 3.0 (0)
title: Field of Glory II

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 560 Series (POLARIS11 / DRM 3.23.0 / 4.15.0-34-generic, LLVM 6.0.0)
notes:
Initially game crashed with The launcher starts but the games crashes. "Failed to create device for rendering. Invalid resolution or cannot run without at least shader model 3.0 (0)'. To fix that one need to apply fix described in https://forum.winehq.org/viewtopic.php?f=8&t=30764

1. Go to <steam-library</steamapps/compatdata/660160/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/FieldOfGlory2.
2. Open OPTIONS.TXT.
3. Change RezX to your horizontal resolution (mine is RezX 1920).
4. Change RezY to your vertical resolution (mine is RezX 1200).
5. Change Fullscreen to 0.

After that the game can be run. I hadn't observed any issues, although it was my first play ever.
title: Field of Glory II

notes: Works great once you edit OPTIONS.TXT. That file was not in the same place as for others. I found it in /Steam/steamapps/common/Field of Glory II/Core/UI
title: Field of Glory II

gpu: Intel Open Source Technology Center Mesa DRI Intel(R) HD Graphics 620 (Kaby Lake GT2) x86/MMX/SSE2
notes: ERROR: Failed to create device for rendering. Invalid resolution, or cannot run without at least shader model 3.0 (0)
title: Field of Glory II

notes: Edit ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/660160/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My\ Documents/My\ Games/FieldOfGlory2/OPTIONS.TXT. Change Fullscreen 1 to Fullscreen 0. Single and multiplayer works. Scenario editor works. 146 hours played.
title: Field of Glory II

notes:
In  ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/660160/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My\ Documents/My\ Games/FieldOfGlory2/OPTIONS.TXT apply these settings(or the game may not launch and just give err about not being able to create device for render/not having at least shader model 3.0) :
RezX xxx(yr current monitor width)
RezY yyy(yr current monitor height)
Fullscreen 0
title: Field of Glory II

notes:
After clicking on 'play game' on splash screen, and getting a message that it will attempt to connect to the internet, get full screen 'black screen', which then switches to three other sizes of all black window before giving "Failed to create device for rendering. Invalid resolution, or cannot run without at least shader model 3.0 (0)" error.

Tried PROTON_USE_WINED3D, PROTON_NO_D3D11 and PROTON_NO_ESYNC options separately without any success. Not tried them together.
title: Field of Glory II

notes: After tweaking Options.txt, this game works shockingly well on my Thinkpad X230.
title: Field of Glory II
